hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=(j.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';process.exit(f.endsWith('commands.ts')?0:1);})" && cd 'C:/Code/pncli' && npm run build --silent && node scripts/update-copilot-instructions.mjs 2>/dev/null || true
